div.style: color: #cdd6f4; line-height: 20px; white-space: pre-wrap; word-break: break-all;

foreignObject.div: $ unityctl project-validate --project ./MyGame --json { "valid": false, "checks": [ { "name": "compile", "passed": true, "severity": "error" }, { "name": "buildScenes", "passed": true, "severity": "error" }, { "name": "camera", "passed": false, "severity": "error", "message": "No main camera in active scene" }, { "name": "light", "passed": true, "severity": "warning" }, { "name": "consoleErrors", "passed": true, "severity": "error" }, { "name": "editorState", "passed": true, "severity": "error" } ] } ↑ AI agent reads this, creates camera, re-validates → valid: true
